clockwork_dragon: The final form is a tiny feminine clockwork dragon with polished brass plates, curved horns, bright teal eyes, and a cheerful little grin. A pink bow with a heart centre rests between the horns, copper wings fold neatly at the back, and a curled mechanical tail ticks with precise little movements. Small pipes around the head and shoulders release soft puffs of steam, while a glowing heart panel sits neatly in the chest plating.
haunted_teapot: The final form is a haunted porcelain teapot with a rounded glossy body, elegant gold trim, glowing purple eyes, and a painted smug little smile. A fitted lid rests on top, a curved handle and spout complete the teapot shape, and ghostly steam constantly curls from the spout. Tiny spirits and purple wisps drift around the porcelain body like supernatural tea party guests.
glitter_goblin: The final form is a short female glitter goblin with bright green skin, pointed ears, sparkling freckles, sharp little teeth, and wild teal and purple hair. Gems, stars, ribbons, and shiny treasures are tangled through the hair and outfit. The body is small and wiry, with quick goblin movements and a chaotic patchwork outfit covered in sequins, scraps, beads, and glittering craft supplies.
boutique_mannequin: The final form is a stylish boutique mannequin with smooth glossy skin, elegant painted features, long pink hair, and a permanently poised expression. The body has a polished display-window finish, with a feminine bust, graceful waist, balanced hips, and unnaturally perfect posture. A chic green dress, autumn-orange scarf, neat belt, gold jewellery, and fixed model-like pose complete the fashionable shop display look.
rubber_duck: The final form is a small glossy rubber duck with a bright yellow toy body, rounded sides, long lashes, a smug sideways glance, and a tiny golden crown. The body is simplified into a buoyant bath-toy shape with an orange beak, smooth rubber surface, and no separate human limbs. Every movement has a soft squeak, a light wobble, and a dainty splash.
magical_maid: The final form is a cheerful feminine magical maid with bright blue eyes, curled brown hair tied back with a large pink bow, and a frilly maid headband. The body has a soft feminine figure suited to a cute magical helper, with graceful hands and lively posture. A black-and-white maid dress with pink ribbons, heart buttons, puffed sleeves, a neat apron, and sparkly magical trim completes the look.
pocket_fairy: The final form is a tiny female fairy with a pocket-sized body, delicate limbs, pointed ears, blonde hair, sparkling purple eyes, and a very serious little expression. The body is light enough to flutter, with shimmering wings spreading from the back and soft magical sparkles trailing from every movement. A pastel pink-and-lavender fairy dress, tiny star details, and a little tiara complete the miniature royal fairy look.
porcelain_princess: The final form is a delicate porcelain princess figure with glossy pale ceramic skin, soft blue eyes, painted dark blue eye shadow, full ruby-red painted lips, and a permanently graceful smile. The body is smooth, fragile, and doll-like, with a refined feminine shape, careful painted details, and controlled decorative posture. White-blonde curls, a jeweled tiara, blue-and-gold jewellery, and a painted porcelain gown complete the glass-cabinet princess appearance.
cat_cafe_girl: The final form is a cute cat café girl with soft cat ears, a swishing tail, bright curious eyes, and a cosy café uniform. The body is feminine and agile, with light balanced movements, soft feline posture, and expressive catlike reactions. Small feline details shape the face and gestures, while the café outfit gives the whole form a warm, playful server look.
moonlit_witch: The final form is a moonlit witch with flowing auburn hair, bright green eyes, and a crooked purple hat marked with a golden crescent moon. The body has a confident feminine silhouette, graceful hands, and theatrical posture suited to wand waving and harmless magical trouble. A star-speckled cloak, purple witch dress, gold trim, and glowing star wand complete the moonlit magical outfit.
living_plush_bunny: The final form is a living girly plush bunny with huge floppy stitched ears, cream plush fur, pink fluffy hair, bright blue eyes, and a tiny bunny nose. The body is soft, cuddly, and toy-like, with rounded plush curves, padded paws, stitched seams, and a squeezable fabric texture. A sweet pink dress with bows, buttons, frills, and little stitched details completes the dangerously huggable shelf-toy look.
office_sorceress: The final form is a glamorous office sorceress with golden hair swept into a bouncy ponytail, glowing glasses, star earrings, and a crescent necklace. The body has a stylish feminine office silhouette, with a fitted deep-purple blazer, sleek pencil skirt, sheer tights, and polished confident posture. A pen-wand, magical paperwork, orbiting paperclips, and hovering sticky notes give the form a sharp corporate magic finish.
bubble_mermaid: The final form is a bright bubbly mermaid with pale shimmering skin, flowing blue and teal hair, emerald eyes, soft blue lips, and a starfish tucked into the curls. The upper body has a graceful feminine shape with pearl bracelets, shell earrings, and a glittering purple shell top. Below the waist is a sparkling turquoise mermaid tail with fins, scales, and bubbles drifting around every movement.
tin_robot_assistant: The final form is a cheerful tin robot assistant with a shiny silver body, bright teal eyes, rosy metal cheeks, and a blinking pink antenna. The body is mechanical but distinctly feminine in shape, with smooth curved plating, a narrow waist, rounded hips, segmented arms, and a glowing pink heart panel in the chest. Every movement comes with polite clinks, whirrs, and delighted little beeps.
garden_gnome_lady: The final form is a cheerful garden gnome lady with a tall red pointy hat, bouncy blonde hair, bright green eyes, rosy cheeks, and a daisy tucked into the hat. The body is short, sturdy, and feminine, with practical little proportions and a cosy garden-worker stance. A green gnome dress, puffed sleeves, lace-up bodice, wide brown belt, red gloves, cream apron, and golden watering can complete the gardening guardian look.
candyfloss_sprite: The final form is a candyfloss sprite with huge pastel pink and lavender hair, pointed little ears, bright blue eyes, and a cloud-soft sugar outfit. The body is small, light, and sprite-like, with fluffy candyfloss wings, delicate limbs, and sugary sparkles dusting the skin and clothes. Swirls of pink, blue, and white candy texture drift around the form, along with lollipops, stars, bubbles, and glittering crumbs of magic.
mini_dragon_librarian: The final form is a tiny female humanoid-dragon librarian with curled horns, pointed ears, rosy scales, round spectacles, small wings, and a curled tail. The body is compact and dragon-like, with little claws, warm smoky breath, and precise book-handling movements. Purple hair pinned with a bow, a smart cardigan, blouse, and a stack of guarded books complete the tiny severe librarian look.
enchanted_doll: The final form is an enchanted doll with glossy blue doll eyes, painted rosy cheeks, neat lashes, and perfectly curled brown hair tied with a large red bow. The body is artificial and doll-like, with delicate wooden toy joints, smooth surfaces, small careful hands, and a posed feminine shape. A blue party dress, white frills, red collar ribbon, frilly apron, painted smile, and faint clicking hinges complete the polite tea-party doll appearance.
rainbow_slime_girl: The final form is a rainbow slime girl with a colourful translucent goo body, bright cheerful eyes, and glossy dripping rainbow hair. The body has a soft feminine shape made from shiny jelly-like slime, with flexible limbs, wobbly curves, and edges that shift slightly with movement. A cute slime dress with rainbow frills, shiny drips, and sparkling droplets completes the squishy magical look.
starry_stage_magician: The final form is a glamorous stage magician with warm brown skin, flowing black hair, golden jhumka earrings, and confident theatrical posture. The body has a polished feminine stage presence, with graceful hands made for flourishes and dramatic reveals. Ornate embroidered tuxedo tails, white gloves, a burgundy-and-gold top hat, a wand, fluttering cards, and glittering stage magic complete the performance-ready appearance.
tea_party_hostess: The final form is a cheerful tea party hostess with glossy black curls, black-tea-brown eyes, and a flower-trimmed hat tied with a soft pink bow. The body has a tidy feminine shape, graceful hands, and carefully arranged posture suited to serving tea and managing guests. A frilly pink dress, ruffled apron, dainty gloves, pearl-perfect smile, teacup, and matching teapot complete the proper hostess look.
clocktower_ghost_girl: The final form is a friendly clocktower ghost girl with a soft blue glow, misty flowing hair, pale violet skin, and a translucent body that fades into haunted clockwork fog. The body is weightless and feminine, drifting just above the ground with faintly luminous edges. A ruffled blouse, striped bodice, dark skirt, gear brooch, pocket watch, bell, ghostly clock hands, and shimmering gears complete the polite supernatural timepiece look.
ballerina_music_box: The final form is a glossy porcelain ballerina figurine with painted lashes, rosy cheeks, polished nails, and a perfect little smile. The body is delicate, feminine, and doll-still, posed with careful ballerina balance and music-box precision. A shining white tutu, ballet slippers, ribbons, and a tiny wind-up key complete the display figurine appearance.
lady_knight_mouse: The final form is a brave little lady knight mouse with round ears, whiskers, a small muzzle, soft fur, and a thin tail. The body is tiny, feminine, and mouse-like, with quick little movements and a surprisingly heroic stance. A thimble helmet, polished heart-trimmed armour, sweeping red cape, tiny sword, and biscuit-marked shield complete the miniature knightly look.
crystal_fairy_queen: The final form is a tiny crystal fairy queen with shimmering blue gemlike skin, lavender hair, stained-glass wings, and a dramatic sparkling crown. The body is small, feminine, and elegant, with crystalline highlights across the skin, hair, wings, and clothing. Rainbow sparkles scatter from every pose, while regal jewellery and glittering fairy details complete the miniature royal appearance.
pumpkin_girl: The final form is a cheerful pumpkin girl with warm orange skin, golden eyes, and huge leafy green hair curling like living vines. The body has a soft feminine harvest-season shape, with rounded pumpkin warmth, vine-like details, and autumn-coloured charm. A bright pumpkin-petal dress, leafy collar and waist, playful vine bracelet, cinnamon scent, fallen-leaf traces, and seed-shaped sparkles complete the seasonal plant-girl look.
velvet_lounge_siren: The final form is a glamorous velvet lounge siren with warm tanned skin, big expressive eyes, and long dark waves styled with a deep red rose and feathered hairpiece. The body has a poised feminine lounge silhouette, with a confident bust, smooth waist, graceful hips, and slow stage-ready posture. A rich burgundy evening gown, high slit, matching opera gloves, ruby jewellery, vintage microphone, and cocktail complete the late-night jazz glamour.
moonlit_vampire_lady: The final form is a moonlit vampire lady with soft pale skin, bright mischievous eyes, pointed ears, tiny fangs, and glossy black hair swept into a cute retro wave. The body has an elegant feminine gothic silhouette, with cool skin, graceful hands, and a poised midnight-hostess stance. A black and crimson gown, lace trim, long gloves, dramatic cape collar, ruby jewellery, and moonlit glow complete the vampire ball look.
cabaret_catwoman: The final form is a glamorous cabaret catwoman with golden-blonde curls, matching cat ears, a swaying blonde tail, and sharp purple eyes lined with stage makeup. The body has a feminine showgirl silhouette with feline balance, graceful hips, and smooth catlike movement. A sparkling black-and-purple cabaret costume, opera gloves, tiny feathered top hat, gold jewellery, rose-and-chain detail, and theatrical smile complete the stage-cat look.
rose_court_enchantress: The final form is a rose court enchantress with deep brown skin, flowing dark auburn curls, bright green eyes, and a confident courtly smile. The body has a regal feminine silhouette, graceful arms, and composed posture suited to command and display. A burgundy gown of layered rose-petal skirts, thorn-laced sleeves, ruby jewellery, a crown of crimson roses and dark briars, thorny bracelets, and drifting petals complete the dangerous floral court look.
neon_demon_hostess: The final form is a neon demon hostess with rich red skin, polished horns, glowing golden eyes, pointed ears, sharp little fangs, and a swishing devil tail. The body has a bold feminine nightclub silhouette, with confident posture, glossy gloves, and bright neon highlights tracing the form. A black-and-purple hostess outfit, jewel details, sparkling accents, tray of pretty cocktails, and luminous streaks complete the stylish demon-hostess appearance.
velvet_fetish_doll: The final form is a living crimson velvet doll with plush red skin, glossy black curls, painted doll-like features, and neat stitched seams tracing the soft fabric body. The body has a posed feminine doll silhouette with a soft bust, narrow waist, rounded hips, fabric limbs, and display-ready posture. A polished black-and-red doll corset, shiny gloves, delicate straps, bows, buckles, ruffles, velvet rustle, and glossy trim complete the carefully arranged doll look.
honey_nymph: The final form is a honeyed nectar nymph with glossy golden skin, syrupy hair, and a body that glows like warm liquid amber. The body has a soft feminine nymph silhouette, with smooth sticky shine, slow graceful movement, and little honey droplets trailing from every gesture. A translucent flower-petal dress, honeycomb details, bright daisy blooms, cheerful bees, golden sparkles, and a wildflower-sugar scent complete the sunlit nectar look.
leather_biker_rogue: The final form is a leather biker rogue with wild black hair, a bold pale streak, hoop earrings, a studded choker, and a troublemaking smile. The body has a confident feminine biker silhouette, with strong posture, grounded movements, and road-ready swagger. A fitted black leather jacket, glossy corset top, fingerless gloves, chained belt, road-worn biker gear, and the scent of oil, smoke, and polished hide complete the rogue look.
gilded_goddess: The final form is a gilded statuesque goddess with cool white marble skin, faint stone veining, reflective highlights, and bright golden eyes. The body is tall, feminine, sculpted, and statue-perfect, with smooth marble surfaces, regal stillness, and slow deliberate movement. Flowing liquid-gold hair, metallic lips and eyeshadow, golden jewellery, bands, chains, earrings, delicate headpiece, and a glossy liquid-gold gown complete the living idol appearance.
satin_sleepwear_spirit: The final form is a misty satin sleepwear spirit with moonlit lavender skin, cloud-soft hair, and a pale semi-transparent body. The body is feminine, weightless, and ghostlike, with soft spectral edges, floating movement, and a sleepy moon-glow trailing behind it. A glossy nightgown, ribbons of dream-cloud, soft lace, drifting satin, and starlit mist complete the pretty dream-spirit appearance.
latex_android: The final form is a midnight latex android with sleek black synthetic plating, glossy curved limbs, and luminous violet circuitry across the body. The body is artificial and feminine, with a smooth bust, narrow waist, rounded hips, polished synthetic surfaces, precise joints, and perfectly controlled movement. Spiralling sci-fi optics, a soft electronic hum, and high-gloss black plating complete the glamorous future-machine look.
forest_nymph: The final form is a radiant forest nymph with soft green skin, flowing dark emerald hair, pointed ears, and blossoms tucked through every curl. The body has a feminine woodland silhouette, light natural movement, and living plant details woven through the limbs and clothing. Leaves, curling vines, bright wildflowers, butterflies, petals, golden sparkles, and the scent of damp earth and blooming woodland flowers complete the forest spirit look.
luminous_water_nymph: The final form is a luminous water nymph with a translucent deep-cerulean body made from living, shimmering liquid. The body has a graceful feminine aquatic silhouette, fluid curves, rippling skin, and hair that flows weightlessly like an underwater current. Sea-foam lace, glowing pearl strands, droplets, bubbles, refreshing spray, soft splashes, and shifting blue light complete the mesmerising water-spirit appearance.
